sourceAmbiguity: Exact patient-facing wording for every claim and hold reason was under-specified.
decisionTaken: Introduce a small content pack inside ClaimResumePostureProjection with plain-language titles, explanations, context labels, and next-safe actions.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: The copy avoids jargon, preserves context, and does not expose raw grant or subject internals.
operationalRisk: Future clinical-safety review may refine wording.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Update the content pack and reason-code matrix together.
